name: vue-aria
description: Vue port of React Aria and React Spectrum

scripts.check:generated: npm run generate:status && npm run generate:docs && npm run compute:port-order && git diff --exit-code status.md docs/port-status.md docs/package-status.json port-order.json packages/*/*/docs/*.mdx
scripts.check:ci: npm run check:baseline && npm run check:local-deps && npm run check:parity && npm run check:test-parity && npm run check:deviations && npm run check:visual && npm run check:docs-frontmatter && npm run validate:status && npm run check:generated && npm run test:ssr && npm run test:unit
scripts.generate:docs: npm run generate:docs-headers && npm run generate:docs-status && npm run generate:docs-package-status
scripts.status:refresh: npm run sync:status && npm run generate:status && npm run generate:docs && npm run validate:status && npm run compute:port-order
